case_title: FIA CARD SERVICES N.A. VS. MICHAEL HUMPHREY et al

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES N.A.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10

ORDER DETERMINING CLAIM OF EXEMPTION (OF MICHAEL HUMPHREY) - GRANTED

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES NA'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION (OF MICHAEL HUMPHREY). NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: CLAIM OF EXEMPTION GRANTED. JUDGMENT DEBTOR SATISFIED HIS BURDEN OF SHOWING THAT THE MONIES HELD BY THE SHERIFF ARE EXEMPT. ORDER SIGNED. (302/HEK) JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; NOT REPORTED

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JUL-20-2011 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT MICHAEL HUMPHREY'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. Off Calendar Nov-23-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES NA'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION (of Michael Humphrey).
No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: claim of exemption granted. Judgment debtor satisfied his burden of showing that the monies held by the Sheriff are exempt. Order signed. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported
